summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nexorium authentication system. All backend auth APIs and frontend authentication flows working correctly. Successfully tested JWT authentication, user isolation, cross-user verification, login/logout flows, protected routes, and user-specific data access.
passed_tests: Backend Auth - POST /api/auth/login with user1@nexorium.com/123456 returns valid JWT token
Backend Auth - POST /api/auth/login with user2@nexorium.com/123456 returns valid JWT token
Backend Auth - POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401
Backend Auth - POST /api/auth/register creates new user and returns JWT token
Backend Auth - GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns correct user info
Backend Auth - GET /api/auth/me without token returns 401
Backend Auth - Protected endpoints (GET /api/stats, GET /api/assets) require auth token
Backend Auth - POST /api/assets/upload with auth creates asset owned by logged-in user
Backend Auth - GET /api/assets only returns current user's assets (user isolation working)
Backend Auth - POST /api/verify can find assets from any user (cross-user verification working)
Frontend Auth - Unauthenticated users correctly redirected to /login page
Frontend Auth - Login page displays demo credentials and functional form
Frontend Auth - Login flow: credentials → sign in → redirect to dashboard working
Frontend Auth - Dashboard shows only logged-in user's assets and stats
Frontend Auth - Upload page accessible with authentication, wallet connection working
Frontend Auth - Profile drawer shows correct logged-in user info and stats
Frontend Auth - Logout button works and redirects to login page
Frontend Auth - Register page accessible from login page with functional form
Frontend Auth - Navbar shows Dashboard/Upload/Verify links + logout button when authenticated
Frontend Auth - User isolation: User1 and User2 see different assets (NFT-63256 vs NFT-37369)
Frontend Auth - Cross-user verification: User2 can verify User1's assets showing correct owner
Frontend Auth - Asset search functionality working with user-specific results
Frontend Auth - Verification with valid hash shows ownership details
Frontend Auth - Verification with invalid hash shows 'Not Found' message

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All authentication flows and UI components working correctly)
